content:
**Your group is on a 60 day streak!** 🔥 Here are yesterday's results:
👑 5/6: <@1071686976283082782>
6/6: <@757449821551460452>
how tf did you do that <:stone:1356053165874741490>
what why is she like this
this was a good run for a newbie like me
i got a monster card and i could get like 6 homing lazers on ravage
what does the prisim module do
Monster cards are a noob trap and you should literally never take them if youre trying to build a deck
A single one takes up like 70% of your save data
For a sec I thought you were talking about Yu-Gi-Oh 🧍
Yeah idk who thought that was a good idea
the like cap of what you need?
why are my better saves lower data
Spirit Kefox is the only one worth taking but you can only get it for non-seasonal content
Different deck modifications cost different amounts
If you go over something gets reverted
Usually deleted basics get added back in
ya a shield was added back in
actually the morale increase upgrade one is semi decent too if you run stall teams
obviously not for speedrun content though
is this a god tier card
i mean it seems pretty op
this run is going very well
also the card that gives +2 on ravage
honestly this is a pretty fucking good run
pretty sure normal homing laser is the best choice here
esp if its the one that returns to hand every start of turn
plus shield on ravage from some equipment
oh my god and pale shooting star gives me 2 ap too because it can use the normal homing laser
I usually just dupe lazer or lazer generators
Seems to be the best play
it got most of the good stuff
the yule goat fell over this year!
it aint arson but its destruction alright :D
The bad part isn’t the chaos
But its the no sweep function
Im taking a break from it
but serenial is so fucking op holy...
i just watch youtube or play morimens
czn is always second focus for me now
I wanna play more games but…
If u look past the horrid currency exchange
nah im good with what i got rn
Basically you just grind for bigger numbers
just morimens, reverse and czn (new and trying it out)
yo i just got hugo at 68 pity
grinding out exp to progress in czn is such a fucking pain tho
When he get epi that makes his upgrade not initation
nah ima just play serenial instead ✌️
yea how tf do i get more exp
Could be useful inside Twin Star's Shadow, but personally I don't like it
me watching people do tribal wars over other people in their community being different
she is a playable unit in morimens
Some became awakeners not from dying 👴
kidding actually, but like besides erica who?
Ryker got fucked over by N, lol
That's how he became an awakener
except for erica, ryker, ramona, and tawil
black pool... is kinda like a second life?
I havent looked too deep into the lore, but it feels a lot like how gaurdians are raised in destiny
death of a person -> resurrected with abilities powered by a foreign source
the silver core is the key to that resurrection tho
a physical manifest of the soul
no silver core, no coming back
i mean yeah, in destiny you start the game after being raised from the dead by a tiny robot after hundreds of years <:takenotes:1357186646294138890>
and the only thing that lets you prevent being perma dead is said robot
Oh, is that why there are often paintings of playable Characters in the Story Mode where they are caught by Black Hands?
Like with Jenkins at the End of Chapter 2 of Arc 1
again, I just know barely even surface level stuff, but I have seen the trope before
Well, at least you know something tbf
Played this game purely for the gameplay
But with all these lore bits being passed around and everything, I may actually read the story now
It's that there are archives for this game, so I don't need to replay to view everything
thats gonna be 4 hours of watching a visual novel
With how slow I read, that's gonna be double

embeds.title: Awakeners 101
embeds.description: Awakeners 101 An in-character study by NikoSpecial thanks to _venush and jadlithon for proofreading  This document aims to explain all that we currently know about Awakeners, Realms, and other related topics. But this isn’t a history lesson. Thanks to Mythag’s extensive history of working with A...
